channel.title: Problem reloading the page
channel.description:
Hello again :( sorry to be so heavy and have so many doubts, but I am a true newbie in programming.
I share the problem in video format:
https://1drv.ms/v/s!AvNQgSX94vj1h-4VeKtox72o9p65DA?e=PaKDed
Does it have something to do with the map being executed before the state is updated and that is why it gives an error?
Some help? :(
Thank you!

item.title: Problem reloading the page
item.dc:creator: codemonkeynorth
item.description:
you may want to do a actions.source.fetch('/') in beforeSSR function in your site index.js so that it is available to begin with instead of having to do it in useEffect

Read full topic

item.title: Problem reloading the page
item.dc:creator: manuwweb
item.description:
I don’t know why, but with:

const data = state.source.get(state.router.link);

It does not retrieve the data from the state.

I have tried this way and it works:

const Projects = ({ state, actions }) => {
    const data = state.source.get('/');

    useEffect(() => {
        actions.source.fetch("/")
    }, []);

    return ( data.isReady &&

I don’t know if this is the best way to do it, but it works!

Thanks a lot for the help, you are the best!

Read full topic

item.title: Problem reloading the page
item.dc:creator: codemonkeynorth
item.description:
it seems you haven’t retrieved the data you’re tying to map over.

try this for instance and see if it helps for now

const data = state.source.get(state.router.link);
const post = state.source[data.type][data.id];  
...
...
return (data.isReady &&
  <div>
   { data.items.map.....

Read full topic

item.title: Problem reloading the page
item.dc:creator: manuwweb
item.description:
Hello again sorry to be so heavy and have so many doubts, but I am a true newbie in programming.

I share the problem in video format:

onedrive.live.com

2021-06-11 20-39-56.mp4

MP4 File

Does it have something to do with the map being executed before the state is updated and that is why it gives an error?

Some help?

Thank you!

Read full topic
